name: mtit-microservices
description: Ride booking microservices + API Gateway (university delivery)

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix ride-booking-system/user-service && npm install --prefix ride-booking-system/driver-service && npm install --prefix ride-booking-system/booking-service && npm install --prefix ride-booking-system/payment-service && npm install --prefix ride-booking-system/api-gateway
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n booking,gw   "npm start --prefix ride-booking-system/booking-service" "npm start --prefix ride-booking-system/api-gateway"
